content.explanation:
**Day 74 — Full Revision: Grammar + Vocabulary + Speaking:**

75 दिनों का सफर लगभग खत्म होने वाला है! आज complete revision करेंगे।

**GRAMMAR REVISION (Days 1-52):**
✅ Simple Present, Past, Future (Days 1, 32)
✅ Be Verb, Has/Have/Had/Will Have (Days 4, 6, 7, 8)
✅ Modal Verbs: Can, Should, May, Must, Would (Days 16-30)
✅ Tenses — All 12 (Days 32-35)
✅ Prepositions (Days 36-37)
✅ Have to/Had to/Will have to (Days 38-39)
✅ Causatives: Make/Get (Day 40)
✅ Going To, About To (Days 41-42)
✅ Conjunctions, WH Words (Days 47-48)
✅ Passive Voice (Days 49-50)
✅ Advanced Structures (Days 51-52)

**VOCABULARY REVISION (Days 53-68):**
✅ Irregular Verbs, Idioms, Professional Words
✅ Stationery, Food, Weather, Family
✅ Professions, Buildings, Nature, Maths
✅ Industry, Judiciary, Sports, Sounds

**WRITING REVISION (Days 69-73):**
✅ Application, Letter, Email, Paragraph, Notice
rules: Modal verbs golden rule: modal + base verb ALWAYS (no s, no ing, no to)
Writing: Application → Faithfully; Letter → Sincerely/Lovingly; Notice → Name+Designation
content.memoryTrick:
**75-DAY JOURNEY SUMMARY:**
• Days 1-10: Basics → Be Verb, Has/Have, There is/are
• Days 11-20: Want, Let, Can, Should, May, Must
• Days 21-30: Used To, Perfect Modals
• Days 31-52: Tenses, Prepositions, Passive, Advanced
• Days 53-68: Vocabulary (8 categories)
• Days 69-73: Writing Skills
• Day 74-75: Revision + Final Test!

examples.hindi: वह 3 साल से यहाँ काम कर रही है।
examples.english: She has been working here for 3 years.

examples.hindi: अगर मैंने पहले पूछा होता, यह नहीं होता।
examples.english: If I had asked earlier, this would not have happened.

examples.hindi: Report तैयार की जा रही है।
न केवल वह talented है बल्कि dedicated भी।
examples.english: Not only is she talented, but she is also dedicated.
She must have known about it.

examples.hindi: काश मैंने इस opportunity को use किया होता।
examples.english: I wish I had made use of this opportunity.

mistakes.wrong: She is working here since 3 years.
mistakes.correct: She has been working here for 3 years.
mistakes.why: Duration = Present Perfect Continuous; 'for' for duration

mistakes.wrong: If I would have studied, I would pass.
mistakes.correct: If I had studied, I would have passed.
mistakes.why: 3rd conditional: if + had + V3 → would have + V3

mistakes.wrong: I wish I have more time.
mistakes.correct: I wish I had more time.

speakingTips: Today speak for 5 minutes non-stop on any topic — use all tenses, modals, conditionals.
Test yourself: Convert 5 Hindi sentences to English using advanced structures.
Celebrate your progress — you have come so far! Keep speaking every day.

vocabulary.example: You are now proficient in English grammar.
Speak confidently with your new skills.
Day 74 is a major milestone in your journey.

practice.hindi: अगर तुम मेहनत करो, तो ज़रूर सफल होगे।
practice.english: If you work hard, you will definitely succeed.
alternatives: you will succeed if you put in efforts.

practice.hindi: उसने मुझे बताया कि वह आएगा।
practice.english: He told me that he would come.
alternatives: he said that he was going to come.
practice.hint: Reported Speech: told me + would come

practice.hindi: यह काम पहले ही हो जाना चाहिए था।
practice.english: This work should have been done earlier.
alternatives: this should have been completed before.

practice.hindi: वह इतनी तेज़ दौड़ती है कि कोई उसे नहीं पकड़ सकता।
practice.english: She runs so fast that no one can catch her.
alternatives: she is so quick that nobody can keep up.

practice.hindi: मैं 10 साल से इस शहर में हूँ।
practice.english: I have been in this city for 10 years.
alternatives: i have lived in this city for a decade.
practice.hint: Present Perfect Continuous: have been + for + time

practice.hindi: जब वह बोलता है, सब सुनते हैं।
alternatives: whenever he talks, people pay attention.

practice.hindi: मुझे यह पहले क्यों नहीं बताया गया?
practice.english: Why was I not told this earlier?
alternatives: why was this not communicated to me before?
practice.hint: Passive Voice: was not told + earlier

practice.hindi: वह बहुत अच्छी तरह से बोलती है।
alternatives: she is an excellent speaker.
practice.hint: speaks well = अच्छी तरह से बोलती है

practice.hindi: मुझे उस पर बहुत विश्वास है।
alternatives: i have a lot of faith in him.

practice.hindi: वह हमेशा मुझे प्रेरित करती है।
alternatives: she always inspires me.

practice.hindi: क्या तुमने कभी किसी विदेशी से बात की है?
practice.english: Have you ever spoken to a foreigner?
alternatives: have you ever talked to someone from abroad?

practice.hindi: वह अपने लक्ष्य की तरफ लगातार बढ़ रहा है।
practice.english: He is consistently moving towards his goal.
alternatives: he is steadily working towards his aim.

practice.hindi: आत्मविश्वास से बोलना बहुत ज़रूरी है।
practice.english: It is very important to speak with confidence.
alternatives: speaking confidently is essential.
practice.hint: speak with confidence = आत्मविश्वास से बोलना

practice.hindi: मैंने जो भी सीखा है वह मैं practice करूँगा।
practice.english: I will practise everything I have learned.
alternatives: i will apply all that i have learned.

practice.hindi: यह course complete करने के बाद मैं fluent English बोल सकूँगा।
practice.english: After completing this course, I will be able to speak fluent English.
alternatives: i will speak english fluently after this course.
practice.hint: After completing + will be able to + speak
